reference: It is very difficult to say whether she is having asthma or anemia. You need to do some tests to find out exactly what the diagnosis is. Get a spirometry done; preferably, post-exercise testing would be beneficial to diagnose exercise-induced asthma. A complete blood count will help us determine whether there is still anemia.
text: It is very difficult to say whether she is having asthma or pneumonia. You need to do some tests to find out exactly what the diagnosis. It is spirometry done, preferably post-exercise testing. Would be beneficial to diagnose exercise-induced asthma. A complete blood count will help us determine whether there is still pneumonia.
